problem id: 4eb990f6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  10001110 -> 01000111
  01010111 -> 00101011
  00100010 -> 00010001
  11010100 -> 01101010
  11000011 -> 01100001
  11100010 -> 01110001
  11011101 -> 01101110
  00010100 -> 00001010
  00000001 -> 00000000

query: 00000011
predicted answer: 00000001
